solutions.solution: (a) As, N O +4 +4 R S 18 19 Similarly, 20 21 T U +4 +4 X Y 24 25 ∴ ? = XY

(a) As, 2 18 20 O R T +1 +1 +1 +1 I J N Similarly, 6 4 8 16 22 F D H P V +1 +1 +1 +1 E G O U 5 7 17 21 ∴ ? = EGOU
(b) ABCDEFGHIJ : PQRST : UVWXY Letters of 'second' part are consecutive of 'first' part.

(c) As, Q T U I L M +3 +1 +3 +1 Similarly, B E F W Z A +3 +1 +3 +1 ∴ ? = WZA
